scripts.test: pnpm --filter @yunqi/domain build && pnpm --filter @yunqi/domain test && pnpm --filter @yunqi/calendar-adapter-tyme4ts test
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @yunqi/domain build && pnpm --filter @yunqi/domain typecheck && pnpm --filter @yunqi/domain test:typecheck && pnpm --filter @yunqi/calendar-adapter-tyme4ts typecheck && pnpm --filter @yunqi/calendar-adapter-tyme4ts test:typecheck
